title: Diagnostics, Build Reports, Metrics, Profiles, and Failure Triage · Transfer Build
summary: An independent documentation team receives a different content tree, language, route base, template, asset set, trust policy, hosting target, and accessibility need and transfers diagnostics, build reports, metrics, profiles, and failure triage into a changed bounded actionable build and publication evidence report. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of bounded actionable build and publication evidence report with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress…
objectives: Represent severity, stable code, source span, stage, message, safe context, cause, suggestion, and ownership separately.
Sort deterministically, deduplicate, cap cascades, promote configured warnings, summarize omissions, and return status from policy.
Record admitted and rejected files, pages, assets, links, bytes, cache hits, stage durations, peak memory, validation findings, and artifact digest.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

steps.title: Static-site publishing and Python Commit to the mission model · Lab Diagnostic Model
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab publishing team handles case 7367 during an accessibility-led community newsroom release. Build deterministic Python evidence to produce deterministic located diagnostics and bounded redacted build metrics; retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity; then replace a trusted author fixture with untrusted raw HTML, unsafe URLs, and an active SVG. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

content.code:
# Evidence: ssg-redaction-retention-1gndkx
# Competency: ssg-redaction-retention.
# Case 9912: an offline-first field documentation build.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, reader task, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: replace a trusted author fixture with untrusted raw HTML, unsafe URLs, and an active SVG.
def evidence_ssg_redaction_retention_1gndkx(diagnostics: int = 7, located: int = 7, build_stages: int = 10, measured_stages: int = 10, unredacted_secrets: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1gndkx = "1gndkx-xkdng1-9912"
    assert evidence_variant_1gndkx
    evidence_axes_1gndkx = (
        "reader1gndkx",
        "source9912",
        "parsexkdng1",
        "route1gndkx9912",
        "artifact99121gndkx",
        "recoveryxkdng19912",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1gndkx)) == 6
    if diagnostics < 0 or located < 0:
        return False, located, "diagnostic-count"
    if located != diagnostics:
        return False, located, "location-coverage"
    if build_stages < 1 or measured_stages != build_stages:
        return False, measured_stages, "metric-coverage"
    if unredacted_secrets > 0:
        return False, unredacted_secrets, "diagnostic-leak"
    assert located == diagnostics
    return True, measured_stages, "actionable-build-report"
